--deleteF
store_truez5delete local packages no longer present in repository)
--download-metadataz
download all the metadata.z
--gpgcheckzBRemove packages that fail GPG signature checking after downloadingz
--downloadcompsz&also download and uncompress comps.xmlz
--metadata-pathzXwhere to store downloaded repository metadata. Defaults to the value of --download-path.)
--newest-onlyz&download only newest packages per-repoz
--norepopathz,Don't add the reponame to the download path.z
--download-pathz
./z&where to store downloaded repositories)
--remote-timezCtry to set local timestamps of local files by the one on the serverz
--sourcez
download only source packagesz
--urlsz:Just list urls of what would be downloaded, don't download)

qrq6|
}	|	S
        return union of these queries:
        - the latest NEVRAs from non-modular packages
        - all packages from stream version with the latest package NEVRA
          (this should not be needed but the latest package NEVRAs might be
          part of an older module version)
        - all packages from the latest stream version
        )
